user_query:
As a proud parent of a Red Star Twirlers member (my daughter Maya), I need help coordinating her team schedule with our family calendar and drafting a clear message to her coach.

Please do the following using the provided local files:

1) Compare team events to family events and identify time conflicts.
- Inputs: "input/team_schedule.csv" and "input/family_calendar.csv".
- A conflict is any event-time overlap greater than 0 minutes (back-to-back with identical end/start times is not a conflict). Treat timestamps as local and in the formats provided.
- Produce "output/conflicts.csv" with these columns for each overlap:
  team_event_date (YYYY-MM-DD), team_event_start (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM), team_event_end (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM), event_type, family_event_title, family_event_start (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM), family_event_end (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM), overlap_minutes (integer).

2) Create an attendance plan for each team event based on conflicts and whether attendance is required.
- Use the same inputs as above and the attendance_required field in team_schedule.csv.
- Save to "output/attendance_plan.json" as an array of objects with fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), start (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM), end (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM), event_type, attendance_required ("Yes" or "No"), plan (one of: "Attend", "Needs Excuse", "Attend (Optional)", "Skip (Optional)"), conflict_titles (array of family event titles that overlap; empty if none).
- Plan rules:
  • If attendance_required is "Yes" and there is any conflict, plan = "Needs Excuse"; if no conflict, plan = "Attend".
  • If attendance_required is "No" and there is any conflict, plan = "Skip (Optional)"; if no conflict, plan = "Attend (Optional)".

3) Inspect the forms folder and summarize document status in a drafted email to the coach.
- Inputs: "input/contacts.json" for names, and the required document list in "input/required_documents.txt". Inspect the directory "input/forms/" to determine which required files are present (match by exact filename listed in required_documents.txt).
- Draft a concise email and save it as plain text to "output/email_to_coach.txt". The email should:
  • Start with "Hi Coach Jordan," and be addressed from me (Alex Rivera) about my child (Maya Rivera) of the Red Star Twirlers.
  • Briefly list each team event that requires an excuse (plan = "Needs Excuse") with event type and date/time window.
  • Note any optional events we will skip if they conflict (plan = "Skip (Optional)").
  • Summarize form status based on the inspection of input/forms/ vs input/required_documents.txt: list which required files are present and which are still missing. Do not claim attachments; just report status.
  • Close politely with my name.

Outputs to create:
- output/conflicts.csv
- output/attendance_plan.json
- output/email_to_coach.txt

Please rely only on the provided files and the actual contents of the input/forms directory. Create the output/ directory if it does not exist. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
